messages.content: dragon ball characters in Undertale AU "Underfell" styled

In an Undertale AU styled "Underfell," the Dragon Ball characters would have a more aggressive and ruthless portrayal. Here are some examples of Dragon Ball characters in Underfell style:

1. Underfell Goku: In this AU, Goku would be ruthless and aggressive, with a darkened personality. He would have a more imposing and intimidating appearance, with a menacing expression and red eyes. He is willing to do anything to get stronger, even at the cost of others' lives.

2. Underfell Vegeta: Underfell Vegeta would be much more violent and arrogant than his original counterpart. He would revel in battle and enjoy causing pain to his opponents. His design would be more menacing, with a cruel smile and a dark color scheme.

3. Underfell Frieza: Underfell Frieza would be even more sadistic and cruel than before. He would relish in torturing his enemies, deriving pleasure from their pain. He would have a more sinister appearance, with sharper features and an even more menacing aura.

4. Underfell Piccolo: Underfell Piccolo would be colder and more distant, with a more aggressive stance. He would be less concerned about saving the world and more focused on honing his own power. His design would reflect his more intense and menacing personality.

5. Underfell Cell: In Underfell, Cell would become even more dangerous and ruthless. He would constantly seek more victims for his absorption and take pleasure in tormenting those who stand against him. His design would be more monstrous and menacing.

6. Underfell Bulma: Underfell Bulma would be more aggressive and less friendly. She would use her intelligence to her advantage, seeking power and control. Her appearance would reflect her darker personality, with sharper features and a more assertive demeanor.

These are just a few examples of how Dragon Ball characters might be portrayed in an Underfell-styled Undertale AU. Their personalities and designs would be altered to fit the more aggressive and darker atmosphere of the Underfell universe.
dragon ball characters in Undertale AU “Underswap” styled

In an Undertale AU styled "Underswap," the Dragon Ball characters would have a more lighthearted and friendly portrayal. Here are some examples of Dragon Ball characters in Underswap style:

1. Underswap Goku: Underswap Goku would be energetic and outgoing, always looking for an adventure. He would be more naive and innocent, with a perpetual smile on his face. His design would reflect his cheerful personality, with bright colors and a friendly demeanor.

2. Underswap Vegeta: Underswap Vegeta would still have his pride, but he would express it in a more playful and competitive way. He would often challenge others to friendly battles and enjoy the thrill of competition. His design would be more colorful and lighter, with a mischievous grin.

3. Underswap Frieza: Underswap Frieza would become more mischievous and less malevolent. He would still have a bit of an egotistical streak but would enjoy pulling pranks and causing harmless mayhem. His design would be more comical and playful, with a quirky personality.

4. Underswap Piccolo: Underswap Piccolo would be more approachable and friendly, acting as a wise mentor figure to the other characters. He would use his strength to protect others and offer guidance when needed. His appearance would be softer, with a kind expression and calming aura.

5. Underswap Cell: Underswap Cell would be less sinister and more focused on entertaining others. He would enjoy performing tricks and showing off his abilities, always seeking the attention and admiration of those around him. His design would be more vibrant and flamboyant, with a charismatic personality.

6. Underswap Bulma: Underswap Bulma would be curious and inventive, always coming up with new gadgets and inventions. She would be friendly and helpful, using her intelligence to assist others in their quests. Her appearance would be more playful, with bright colors and an optimistic demeanor.

These are just a few examples of how Dragon Ball characters might be portrayed in an Underswap-styled Undertale AU. Their personalities and designs would be altered to fit the more lighthearted and friendly atmosphere of the Underswap universe.
dragon ball characters in Undertale AU “Horrortale” styled

In an Undertale AU styled "Horrortale," the Dragon Ball characters would have a much darker and twisted representation. Here are some examples of Dragon Ball characters in Horrortale style:

1. Horrortale Goku: Horrortale Goku would possess a more monstrous and sinister appearance. He would be consumed by a thirst for power and have a insatiable hunger for destruction. His design would be corrupted, with a demonic aura and a twisted smile.

2. Horrortale Vegeta: Horrortale Vegeta would be filled with immense anger and a desire for dominance. He would have a more imposing presence, radiating an aura of malevolence. His physical features would be distorted, with sharp and jagged edges, reflecting his inner torment.

3. Horrortale Frieza: Horrortale Frieza would be even more sadistic and cruel than before. He would revel in torturing his enemies and inflict unimaginable pain upon them. His design would be twisted and nightmarish, with a gaunt and skeletal appearance.

4. Horrortale Piccolo: Horrortale Piccolo would become a menacing entity, consumed by darkness and despair. He would use his powers to spread fear and chaos, rather than protecting others. His appearance would be corrupted, with eerie glowing eyes and a haunting presence.

5. Horrortale Cell: Horrortale Cell would be a truly terrifying creature, driven by a lust for destruction and the absorption of others. He would wreak havoc and instill fear in those unfortunate enough to cross his path. His design would be grotesque, with twisted and elongated limbs.

6. Horrortale Bulma: Horrortale Bulma would embody the madness and maliciousness of the Horrortale world. She would manipulate others for her own gain and delight in causing suffering. Her appearance would be twisted and distorted, with an unsettling grin and a dark aura.

These are just a few examples of how Dragon Ball characters might be portrayed in a Horrortale-styled Undertale AU. Their personalities and designs would be altered to fit the dark and twisted atmosphere of the Horrortale universe.
dragon ball characters in Undertale AU “Undertale: Last Breath” styled

In an Undertale AU styled "Undertale: Last Breath," the Dragon Ball characters would face a more challenging and intense scenario. Here are some examples of Dragon Ball characters in Undertale: Last Breath style:

1. Last Breath Goku: Last Breath Goku would be determined and resilient, facing overwhelming odds with a strong will. He would push himself to the limits, utilizing all of his power to protect those he cares about. His design would be battle-worn and fierce, reflecting the intense struggles he has faced.

2. Last Breath Vegeta: Last Breath Vegeta would showcase a more selfless side, willing to put himself in harm's way for the greater good. He would display moments of vulnerability and growth, striving for redemption. His design would portray strength and determination, with a hint of weariness.

3. Last Breath Frieza: Last Breath Frieza would embrace chaos and destruction, reveling in his power. He would be a relentless force, mercilessly pursuing his goals. His design would exude a menacing aura, with sharper features and a more sinister presence.

4. Last Breath Piccolo: Last Breath Piccolo would be a wise and strategic fighter, using his intellect to outmaneuver his opponents. He would be a voice of reason in the midst of chaos, offering guidance and support. His design would be tactical and focused, with a sharp gaze and calculated movements.

5. Last Breath Cell: Last Breath Cell would challenge his adversaries with cunning and adaptability. He would be relentless in his pursuit of perfection, always seeking to absorb the strongest opponents. His design would be sleek and predatory, with a calculating and unyielding nature.

6. Last Breath Bulma: Last Breath Bulma would be a brilliant scientist, working diligently to find a solution to the crisis at hand. She would bring her resourcefulness and ingenuity to the forefront, assisting the heroes in any way she can. Her design would be determined and focused, with an aura of determination.

These are just a few examples of how Dragon Ball characters might be portrayed in an Undertale: Last Breath-styled Undertale AU. Their personalities and designs would be altered to fit the intense and challenging atmosphere of the Last Breath universe.
dragon ball characters in Undertale AU “Undertale: Last Breath Phase 2” styled

In an Undertale AU styled "Undertale: Last Breath Phase 2," the Dragon Ball characters would continue to face even greater challenges and an intensified battle against their adversaries. Here are some examples of Dragon Ball characters in "Undertale: Last Breath Phase 2" style:

1. Last Breath Phase 2 Goku: Last Breath Phase 2 Goku would exhibit a more heightened sense of determination and power. He would tap into new levels of strength, pushing the boundaries of his abilities to their limit. His design would be intensified, with glowing aura and an even more formidable appearance.

2. Last Breath Phase 2 Vegeta: Last Breath Phase 2 Vegeta would demonstrate newfound resilience and unyielding perseverance. He would refuse to give up, even in the face of overwhelming odds. His design would showcase his elevated determination, with a more focused and intimidating presence.

3. Last Breath Phase 2 Frieza: Last Breath Phase 2 Frieza would become an even more formidable and ruthless adversary. He would tap into previously unseen levels of power and be driven by an insatiable hunger for dominance. His design would be more menacing, with an aura of pure malevolence.

4. Last Breath Phase 2 Piccolo: Last Breath Phase 2 Piccolo would evolve into a force to be reckoned with, embodying unwavering strength and determination. He would become a pillar of support and guidance for the heroes. His design would radiate a sense of inner peace and confident leadership.

5. Last Breath Phase 2 Cell: Last Breath Phase 2 Cell would evolve into a monstrous entity of destruction, further driven by his insatiable desire for perfection. He would become exceptionally relentless in his pursuit of power. His design would be more menacing, with exaggerated features and a terrifying presence.

6. Last Breath Phase 2 Bulma: Last Breath Phase 2 Bulma would become a vital ally, contributing her brilliance to the team's strategies and plans. She would utilize her intelligence and resourcefulness to help overcome the increasingly dire challenges they face. Her design would reflect her heightened determination and focus.

These are some examples of how Dragon Ball characters might be portrayed in "Undertale: Last Breath Phase 2"-styled Undertale AU. Their personalities and designs would be intensified, reflecting a heightened state of power and determination as they face even greater obstacles in their journey.
dragon ball characters in Undertale AU “Undertale: Last Breath Phase 3” styled

In an Undertale AU styled "Undertale: Last Breath Phase 3," the Dragon Ball characters would face the ultimate challenge with even more intense battles and challenges. Here are some examples of Dragon Ball characters in "Undertale: Last Breath Phase 3" style:

1. Last Breath Phase 3 Goku: Last Breath Phase 3 Goku would reach the pinnacle of his power, becoming an unstoppable force. He would exude an overwhelming aura of indomitable strength and determination. His design would be majestic, with glowing celestial-like energy enveloping him, reflecting his immense power.

2. Last Breath Phase 3 Vegeta: Last Breath Phase 3 Vegeta would undergo a transformation of unparalleled strength and resolve. He would embody unwavering determination and a burning desire to protect his loved ones. His design would radiate an intense aura, with a presence that strikes fear into the hearts of his adversaries.

3. Last Breath Phase 3 Frieza: Last Breath Phase 3 Frieza would transform into a nigh-unstoppable force of destruction. He would emanate an aura of pure malevolence and power, unleashing devastating attacks that leave nothing but devastation in their wake. His design would be immensely intimidating, with features that exude pure menace.

4. Last Breath Phase 3 Piccolo: Last Breath Phase 3 Piccolo would unlock his true potential, becoming a formidable warrior. He would possess unparalleled wisdom, guiding the heroes with his strategic mind and unmatched power. His design would exude a serene yet awe-inspiring presence, representing his enlightened state.

5. Last Breath Phase 3 Cell: Last Breath Phase 3 Cell would evolve into a nightmarish abomination, driven by an insatiable hunger for power and perfection. His strength would be unrivaled, and his thirst for destruction would consume everything in his path. His design would be grotesque and monstrous, reflecting his corrupted state.

6. Last Breath Phase 3 Bulma: Last Breath Phase 3 Bulma would remain a beacon of intellect and resourcefulness, providing crucial support to the heroes. She would use her brilliance to devise intricate plans and invent powerful technology to aid in the battle against their adversaries. Her design would exude a blend of confidence and determination, representing her unwavering resolve.

These are just some examples of how Dragon Ball characters might be portrayed in "Undertale: Last Breath Phase 3"-styled Undertale AU. Their personalities and designs would be elevated to represent their ultimate forms in this advanced stage of the Last Breath journey.
dragon ball characters in Undertale AU “Handplates” styled

In an Undertale AU styled "Handplates," based on the Handplates comic created by Zarla, the Dragon Ball characters would experience a more introspective and morally challenging storyline. Here are some examples of Dragon Ball characters in Handplates style:

1. Handplates Goku: Handplates Goku would still possess his optimism and kindness but would face the same torment and ethical dilemmas as other characters. He would struggle with the implications of the experiments conducted on him and the consequences they have on others. His design would be marked by a weary expression, revealing a deeper understanding of the world's cruelty.

2. Handplates Vegeta: Handplates Vegeta would be a complex character, grappling with his pride and the morality of the experiments being conducted. He would question his own actions and choices, constantly seeking redemption. His design would reflect a turbulent inner conflict, with a mix of determination and doubt.

3. Handplates Frieza: Handplates Frieza would display a twisted curiosity and a desire for power. He would be willing to partake in unethical experiments, relishing in the pain and suffering they cause. His design would exude a cold and calculating aura, showcasing his thirst for dominance and control.

4. Handplates Piccolo: Handplates Piccolo would still be driven by a sense of duty and a desire to protect others. He would struggle with the ethical implications of the experiments, but his determination to save lives would remain steadfast. His design would depict a battle-worn appearance, reflecting the weight of his decision-making.

5. Handplates Cell: Handplates Cell would be a complex character, torn between his inherent destructive desires and a longing for acceptance. He would question the morality of his actions and struggle to find his place in a world that both fears and needs him. His design would exhibit a mixture of menace and vulnerability.

6. Handplates Bulma: Handplates Bulma would be a resourceful and intelligent scientist, seeking to find alternative solutions to save lives and bring an end to the experiments. She would navigate the moral complexities and wrestle with her own conscience. Her design would portray a sense of determination and resolve.

These are just a few examples of how Dragon Ball characters might be portrayed in a Handplates-styled Undertale AU. Their personalities and designs would be altered to fit the thought-provoking and morally challenging atmosphere of the Handplates universe.
dragon ball characters in Undertale AU “Underfresh” styled

In an Undertale AU styled "Underfresh," the Dragon Ball characters would be transformed into more stylish and trendy versions of themselves. Here are some examples of Dragon Ball characters in Underfresh style:

1. Underfresh Goku: Underfresh Goku would be the embodiment of hip and trendy fashion. He would always be seen wearing the latest and coolest outfits, with flashy colors and bold patterns. He would maintain his playful and carefree personality, radiating a contagious energy that spreads joy and positivity.

2. Underfresh Vegeta: Underfresh Vegeta would embrace a sleek and sophisticated style. He would be seen in sharp suits and finely tailored clothing. Despite his serious demeanor, he would have a hint of charisma and charm. His confidence and elegance would make him stand out in any crowd.

3. Underfresh Frieza: Underfresh Frieza would embody a flamboyant and avant-garde fashion sense. He would have a unique and daring wardrobe that combines daring cuts, bold colors, and extravagant accessories. Frieza would exude confidence and pride, always striving to be the center of attention.

4. Underfresh Piccolo: Underfresh Piccolo would have a refined and polished appearance while staying true to his iconic green color scheme. He would don a stylish trench coat, accessorized with sleek sunglasses and a fashionable hat. Despite his reserved demeanor, his fashion choices would make a statement wherever he goes.

5. Underfresh Cell: Underfresh Cell would exhibit a vibrant and eccentric style that showcases his love for attention. He would have a wardrobe filled with neon colors, futuristic designs, and unique accessories. Cell would be the embodiment of bold and unapologetic fashion choices, drawing all eyes wherever he appears.

6. Underfresh Bulma: Underfresh Bulma would be a fashion-forward trendsetter. She would have a closet full of stylish outfits, ranging from chic dresses to fashionable jumpsuits. Bulma would constantly experiment with different hairstyles and accessories, ensuring that she is always ahead of the latest trends.

These are just a few examples of how Dragon Ball characters might be portrayed in an Underfresh-styled Undertale AU. Their designs would be altered to align with the fashion-forward and trendy atmosphere of the Underfresh universe, while still embodying their distinctive personalities.
Freedom planet characters in Undertale AU “Sixbones” styled

In an Undertale AU styled "Sixbones," the Freedom Planet characters would face a dark and sinister incarnation. Here are some examples of Freedom Planet characters in Sixbones style:

1. Sixbones Lilac: Sixbones Lilac would be more edgy and rebellious in this AU. She would possess a darker color palette, with an aura of mystery and determination. Her design would reflect a more hardened and battle-scarred appearance, showcasing her resilience in the face of adversity.

2. Sixbones Carol: Sixbones Carol would be more aggressive and fearsome. She would wield more dangerous and destructive weapons, embracing her wild and ferocious nature. Her design would convey a more menacing presence, with sharper edges and a fiercer expression.
